instance.inst-vars: %0 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "y" , i8 , 1 ) ) %1 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "z" , i8 , 0 ) ) %arg0 |-> TV ( i8 , 1 )
%0 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "y" , i8 , 1 ) ) %1 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "z" , i8 , 0 ) ) %arg0 |-> TV ( i8 , 1 )

circt.result: ListItem ( ListItem ( #result ( result , TV ( i8 , 3 ) ) ) ) ListItem ( ListItem ( #result ( result , TV ( i8 , 6 ) ) ) )

observation.ob-in: "Adder/swap1" |-> ListItem ( 1 ) ListItem ( 5 ) "Adder/swap1/wrap" |-> ListItem ( 1 ) "Adder/swap2" |-> ListItem ( 1 ) ListItem ( 5 ) "Adder/swap2/wrap" |-> ListItem ( 1 )
observation.ob-out: "Adder/swap1" |-> ListItem ( #result ( res1 , TV ( i8 , 5 ) ) ) ListItem ( #result ( res2 , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) "Adder/swap1/wrap" |-> ListItem ( #result ( res , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) "Adder/swap2" |-> ListItem ( #result ( res1 , TV ( i8 , 5 ) ) ) ListItem ( #result ( res2 , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) "Adder/swap2/wrap" |-> ListItem ( #result ( res , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) )

mlir.attr-alias: #loc1 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 1 : 33 ) #loc2 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 20 ) #loc3 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 32 ) #loc4 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 45 ) #loc5 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 59 ) #loc6 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 15 : 21 ) #loc7 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 15 : 32 ) #loc8 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 15 : 44 ) #loc |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 1 : 20 )

, .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { argNames |-> [ "xx" , "yy" , .AttributeValueList ] inner_sym |-> #hw < innerSym @sym_swap1 .DialectTypeContentsList > instanceName |-> "swap1" moduleName |-> @Swap parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "res1" , "res2" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) %1#0 , %1#1 , .OpResults = "hw.instance" ( %arg0 , %arg1 , @Swap parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "res1" , "res2" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) %2 , .OpResults = "sv.xmr.ref" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { ref |-> @ref1 verbatimSuffix |-> "" } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) %3 , .OpResults = "sv.xmr.ref" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { ref |-> @ref2 verbatimSuffix |-> ".x.y.z[42]" } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) %4 , .OpResults = "sv.read_inout" ( %2 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %5 , .OpResults = "comb.add" ( %1#0 , %4 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %5 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input a : i8 , input b : i8 , output result : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc6 , #loc7 , #loc8 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Adder" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) "Swap" |-> "hw.module" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , %arg1 : i8 , .VarAndTypeList ) : %0 , .OpResults = "hw.instance" ( %arg0 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { argNames |-> [ "xx" , .AttributeValueList ] inner_sym |-> #hw < innerSym @sym_wrap .DialectTypeContentsList > instanceName |-> "wrap" moduleName |-> @Wrap parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "res" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> .AttributeValueList ] } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) %1 , .OpResults = "sv.wire" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { inner_sym |-> #hw < innerSym @sym_y
